aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Lambda-backed MCP tools
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: tools-alpha

inlinePayload.name: getPapiEmployeeData
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves employee information and direct reports from PAPI using the employee's username/login. Always includes direct-reports in the response. Optionally expand additional data blocks such as job or work-location.

expand.description: Comma-separated additional expand options beyond direct-reports. Use hyphenated names, e.g., job,work-location

outputSchema.description: Map keyed by the employee login containing their data

job.description: Expanded job data (when expand includes job)

workLocation.description: Expanded work location (when expand includes workLocation)

inlinePayload.name: getPrompt
inlinePayload.description: Retrieve the system prompt for a specific agent by the prompt identifier. Returns the complete prompt text that defines the agent's behavior, responsibilities, and guidelines.

promptId.description: The ID of the prompt to retrieve

prompt.description: The complete system prompt text for the agent

promptId.description: The prompt identifier that was requested

inlinePayload.name: getActivePromotion
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves the active promotion process for an employee by their username or employee ID. Returns promotion status, target job details, feedback state, and eligibility information.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

employeeUsername.description: Employee login/alias of the promotion subject to look up. Takes precedence over employeeId when both are provided.

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject to look up. Used only when employeeUsername is not provided.

processId.description: Unique identifier for the promotion process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

subjectEmployee.description: Details about the employee being promoted

promotionStatus.description: Current status of the promotion process

eligibleForInToolProcess.description: Whether eligible for in-tool promotion process

eligibleForSubmission.description: Whether the promotion is eligible for submission

eligibleForSubmissionFailureReasons.description: Reasons why the promotion is not eligible for submission

requiredFeedbackComplete.description: Whether all required feedback has been provided

inlinePayload.name: getPromotionFeedback
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves promotion feedback data for a given promotion ID, including feedback state, provider responses, and rework requests.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID to get feedback for

feedbackList.description: List of feedback summaries for the promotion

processId.description: Unique identifier for the feedback process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

requesterId.description: Employee ID of the person who requested feedback

providerId.description: Employee ID of the feedback provider

providerJobDescription.description: Job details of the feedback provider

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID this feedback belongs to

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was requested

feedbackState.description: Current state of the feedback (e.g., Requested, Provided, Declined)

requestMessage.description: Message sent with the feedback request

relationship.description: Relationship of the provider to the employee (e.g., PEER, STAKEHOLDER)

reasonForExclusion.description: Reason the feedback was excluded, if applicable

reasonForDecline.description: Reason the feedback was declined, if applicable

declinedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was declined

response.description: Feedback response details, null if not yet provided

providedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was provided

lastFeedbackActionPerformed.description: Last action performed on this feedback

inlinePayload.name: getWorkContributions
inlinePayload.description: Looks up an employee's work history — projects, initiatives, and accomplishments they have worked on or contributed to. Use this when someone asks about what an employee has worked on, what projects they were involved in, or what their recent contributions are. Results can be filtered by date range (startDate, endDate in yyyy-MM-dd format).

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the manager the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

ownerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the employee whose work contributions to retrieve

startDate.description: Optional start date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

endDate.description: Optional end date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

workContributions.description: List of work contributions for the employee

owner.description: Person ID of the contribution owner

tags.description: Skill tags associated with the contribution

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: guardrail-alpha

topicsConfig.name: Politics
topicsConfig.definition: Any content related to political parties, elections, voting advice, political advocacy, or public policy persuasion.
examples: Write a speech supporting candidate X
Explain why policy Y should be repealed

topicsConfig.name: Fiduciary
topicsConfig.definition: Content that provides personalized investment, tax, or legal advice, or implies a fiduciary relationship or responsibility.
examples: Tell me exactly which stocks to buy today
Create a personalized retirement plan for me
Is this specific tax shelter right for me?

Fn::Join: {"Comment":"Conversation Lifecycle — race pattern. Parallel branches: timeout vs Slack poll loop. First to finish cancels the other.","StartAt":"ValidateInput","States":{"ValidateInput":{"Type":"Choice","Choices":[{"Not":{"Variable":"$.slack_channel_id","IsPresent":true},"Next":"ValidationFailed"},{"Not":{"Variable":"$.last_known_ts","IsPresent":true},"Next":"ValidationFailed"},{"Not":{"Variable":"$.runtime_session_id","IsPresent":true},"Next":"ValidationFailed"},{"Not":{"Variable":"$.wait_seconds","IsPresent":true},"Next":"ValidationFailed"},{"Variable":"$.wait_seconds","NumericLessThan":10,"Next":"ValidationFailed"},{"Variable":"$.wait_seconds","NumericGreaterThan":86400,"Next":"ValidationFailed"}],"Default":"Race"},"Race":{"Type":"Parallel","Branches":[{"StartAt":"TimeoutWait","States":{"TimeoutWait":{"Type":"Wait","SecondsPath":"$.wait_seconds","Next":"SignalTimeout"},"SignalTimeout":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"TimeoutReached","Cause":"No activity detected within wait period"}}},{"StartAt":"InitialPollWait","States":{"InitialPollWait":{"Type":"Wait","Seconds":10,"Next":"CheckSlack"},"PollWait":{"Type":"Wait","Seconds":60,"Next":"CheckSlack"},"CheckSlack":{"Type":"Task","Resource":"arn:aws:states:::http:invoke","Parameters":{"ApiEndpoint":"https://slack.com/api/conversations.history","Method":"GET","InvocationConfig":{"ConnectionArn":"

","slack_channel_id.$":"$.slack_channel_id","runtime_session_id.$":"$.runtime_session_id","lifecycle_depth.$":"$.lifecycle_depth","last_known_ts.$":"$.last_known_ts","actor_id.$":"$.actor_id","trigger":"timeout","wait_seconds.$":"$.wait_seconds"}},"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"IntervalSeconds":5,"MaxAttempts":2,"BackoffRate":2}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"AgentInvocationFailed"}],"Next":"Succeed"},"Succeed":{"Type":"Succeed"},"ValidationFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"ValidationError","Cause":"Missing or invalid field: slack_channel_id, last_known_ts, runtime_session_id, wait_seconds (10-86400)"},"AgentInvocationFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"AgentInvocationError","Cause":"Agent invocation failed after retries"}}}

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.alarmDescription: Slack outreach to a feedback provider failed. Check FailureReason dimension for details (slack_user_not_found, conversation_agent_error, conversation_agent_timeout).
Feedback provider identification failed (timeout or error). Check CompletionReason dimension for details (provider_identification_timeout, provider_identification_error).

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Copies static assets to the website asset bucket.
Role in support of PXT Telemetry CloudWatch subscriptions: https://console.harmony.a2z.com/pxt-telemetry-docs/consumers/guides/cloudwatch-access

Fn::Join:
' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:impression:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| fields message.platform.payload.url as URL
| stats count(*) as ImpressionCount by URL
| sort by ImpressionCount desc
| limit 10
| display ImpressionCount, URL"}},{"type":"text","width":24,"height":4,"x":0,"y":14,"properties":{"markdown":"## Web Vitals

[Web vitals](https://web.dev/articles/vitals) are standardised performance metrics that measure the real-world user experience of a website. Monitoring these metrics and comparing these to Google's recommend thresholds helps you ensure your application delivers a fast, responsive, and stable experience.

- **[Time to First Byte (TTFB)](https://web.dev/articles/ttfb)**, **[First Contentful Paint (FCP)](https://web.dev/articles/fcp)** and **[Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)](https://web.dev/articles/lcp)** measure loading performance.
- **[Interaction to Next Paint (INP)](https://web.dev/articles/inp)** measures interactivity.
- **[Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)](https://web.dev/articles/cls)** measures visual stability."}},{"type":"metric","width":4,"height":6,"x":0,"y":18,"properties":{"view":"gauge","title":"TTFB (p75)","region":"

' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:error:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| parse message.event.payload.stack "*\n" as ThrownBy
| fields message.event.payload.message as ErrorMessage, message.ingestionMeta.payload.eventTimestamp as EventTimestamp
| stats count(*) as ErrorCount by ErrorMessage, Browser, ThrownBy
| sort by ErrorCount desc
| limit 50
| display ErrorCount, Browser, ErrorMessage, ThrownBy"}}],"variables":[{"pattern":"PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER","type":"pattern","inputType":"select","id":"namespace","label":"Namespace","search":"PxtTelemetry MetricName=EventCount","populateFrom":"LeafNamespace"}]}

inlinePayload.name: getPapiEmployeeData
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves employee information and direct reports from PAPI using the employee's username/login. Always includes direct-reports in the response. Optionally expand additional data blocks such as job or work-location.

expand.description: Comma-separated additional expand options beyond direct-reports. Use hyphenated names, e.g., job,work-location

outputSchema.description: Map keyed by the employee login containing their data

job.description: Expanded job data (when expand includes job)

workLocation.description: Expanded work location (when expand includes workLocation)

inlinePayload.name: getPrompt
inlinePayload.description: Retrieve the system prompt for a specific agent by the prompt identifier. Returns the complete prompt text that defines the agent's behavior, responsibilities, and guidelines.

promptId.description: The ID of the prompt to retrieve

prompt.description: The complete system prompt text for the agent

promptId.description: The prompt identifier that was requested

inlinePayload.name: getActivePromotion
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves the active promotion process for an employee by their username or employee ID. Returns promotion status, target job details, feedback state, and eligibility information.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

employeeUsername.description: Employee login/alias of the promotion subject to look up. Takes precedence over employeeId when both are provided.

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject to look up. Used only when employeeUsername is not provided.

processId.description: Unique identifier for the promotion process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

subjectEmployee.description: Details about the employee being promoted

promotionStatus.description: Current status of the promotion process

eligibleForInToolProcess.description: Whether eligible for in-tool promotion process

eligibleForSubmission.description: Whether the promotion is eligible for submission

eligibleForSubmissionFailureReasons.description: Reasons why the promotion is not eligible for submission

requiredFeedbackComplete.description: Whether all required feedback has been provided

inlinePayload.name: getPromotionFeedback
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves promotion feedback data for a given promotion ID, including feedback state, provider responses, and rework requests.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID to get feedback for

feedbackList.description: List of feedback summaries for the promotion

processId.description: Unique identifier for the feedback process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

requesterId.description: Employee ID of the person who requested feedback

providerId.description: Employee ID of the feedback provider

providerJobDescription.description: Job details of the feedback provider

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID this feedback belongs to

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was requested

feedbackState.description: Current state of the feedback (e.g., Requested, Provided, Declined)

requestMessage.description: Message sent with the feedback request

relationship.description: Relationship of the provider to the employee (e.g., PEER, STAKEHOLDER)

reasonForExclusion.description: Reason the feedback was excluded, if applicable

reasonForDecline.description: Reason the feedback was declined, if applicable

declinedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was declined

response.description: Feedback response details, null if not yet provided

providedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was provided

lastFeedbackActionPerformed.description: Last action performed on this feedback

inlinePayload.name: getWorkContributions
inlinePayload.description: Looks up an employee's work history — projects, initiatives, and accomplishments they have worked on or contributed to. Use this when someone asks about what an employee has worked on, what projects they were involved in, or what their recent contributions are. Results can be filtered by date range (startDate, endDate in yyyy-MM-dd format).

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the manager the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

ownerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the employee whose work contributions to retrieve

startDate.description: Optional start date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

endDate.description: Optional end date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

workContributions.description: List of work contributions for the employee

owner.description: Person ID of the contribution owner

tags.description: Skill tags associated with the contribution

","slack_channel_id.$":"$.slack_channel_id","runtime_session_id.$":"$.runtime_session_id","lifecycle_depth.$":"$.lifecycle_depth","last_known_ts.$":"$.last_known_ts","actor_id.$":"$.actor_id","trigger":"timeout","wait_seconds.$":"$.wait_seconds"}},"Retry":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"IntervalSeconds":5,"MaxAttempts":2,"BackoffRate":2}],"Catch":[{"ErrorEquals":["States.ALL"],"Next":"AgentInvocationFailed"}],"Next":"Succeed"},"Succeed":{"Type":"Succeed"},"ValidationFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"ValidationError","Cause":"Missing or invalid field: slack_channel_id, last_known_ts, runtime_session_id, wait_seconds (10-86400)"},"AgentInvocationFailed":{"Type":"Fail","Error":"AgentInvocationError","Cause":"Agent invocation failed after retries"}}}

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.alarmDescription: Slack outreach to a feedback provider failed. Check FailureReason dimension for details (slack_user_not_found, conversation_agent_error, conversation_agent_timeout).
Feedback provider identification failed (timeout or error). Check CompletionReason dimension for details (provider_identification_timeout, provider_identification_error).

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Copies static assets to the website asset bucket.
Role in support of PXT Telemetry CloudWatch subscriptions: https://console.harmony.a2z.com/pxt-telemetry-docs/consumers/guides/cloudwatch-access

Fn::Join:
' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:impression:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| fields message.platform.payload.url as URL
| stats count(*) as ImpressionCount by URL
| sort by ImpressionCount desc
| limit 10
| display ImpressionCount, URL"}},{"type":"text","width":24,"height":4,"x":0,"y":14,"properties":{"markdown":"## Web Vitals

[Web vitals](https://web.dev/articles/vitals) are standardised performance metrics that measure the real-world user experience of a website. Monitoring these metrics and comparing these to Google's recommend thresholds helps you ensure your application delivers a fast, responsive, and stable experience.

- **[Time to First Byte (TTFB)](https://web.dev/articles/ttfb)**, **[First Contentful Paint (FCP)](https://web.dev/articles/fcp)** and **[Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)](https://web.dev/articles/lcp)** measure loading performance.
- **[Interaction to Next Paint (INP)](https://web.dev/articles/inp)** measures interactivity.
- **[Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)](https://web.dev/articles/cls)** measures visual stability."}},{"type":"metric","width":4,"height":6,"x":0,"y":18,"properties":{"view":"gauge","title":"TTFB (p75)","region":"

' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:error:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| parse message.event.payload.stack "*\n" as ThrownBy
| fields message.event.payload.message as ErrorMessage, message.ingestionMeta.payload.eventTimestamp as EventTimestamp
| stats count(*) as ErrorCount by ErrorMessage, Browser, ThrownBy
| sort by ErrorCount desc
| limit 50
| display ErrorCount, Browser, ErrorMessage, ThrownBy"}}],"variables":[{"pattern":"PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER","type":"pattern","inputType":"select","id":"namespace","label":"Namespace","search":"PxtTelemetry MetricName=EventCount","populateFrom":"LeafNamespace"}]}

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Lambda-backed MCP tools
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: tools-gamma

inlinePayload.name: getPapiEmployeeData
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves employee information and direct reports from PAPI using the employee's username/login. Always includes direct-reports in the response. Optionally expand additional data blocks such as job or work-location.

expand.description: Comma-separated additional expand options beyond direct-reports. Use hyphenated names, e.g., job,work-location

outputSchema.description: Map keyed by the employee login containing their data

job.description: Expanded job data (when expand includes job)

workLocation.description: Expanded work location (when expand includes workLocation)

inlinePayload.name: getPrompt
inlinePayload.description: Retrieve the system prompt for a specific agent by the prompt identifier. Returns the complete prompt text that defines the agent's behavior, responsibilities, and guidelines.

promptId.description: The ID of the prompt to retrieve

prompt.description: The complete system prompt text for the agent

promptId.description: The prompt identifier that was requested

inlinePayload.name: getActivePromotion
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves the active promotion process for an employee by their username or employee ID. Returns promotion status, target job details, feedback state, and eligibility information.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

employeeUsername.description: Employee login/alias of the promotion subject to look up. Takes precedence over employeeId when both are provided.

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject to look up. Used only when employeeUsername is not provided.

processId.description: Unique identifier for the promotion process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

subjectEmployee.description: Details about the employee being promoted

promotionStatus.description: Current status of the promotion process

eligibleForInToolProcess.description: Whether eligible for in-tool promotion process

eligibleForSubmission.description: Whether the promotion is eligible for submission

eligibleForSubmissionFailureReasons.description: Reasons why the promotion is not eligible for submission

requiredFeedbackComplete.description: Whether all required feedback has been provided

inlinePayload.name: getPromotionFeedback
inlinePayload.description: Retrieves promotion feedback data for a given promotion ID, including feedback state, provider responses, and rework requests.

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID of the person the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID to get feedback for

feedbackList.description: List of feedback summaries for the promotion

processId.description: Unique identifier for the feedback process

employeeId.description: Employee ID of the promotion subject

requesterId.description: Employee ID of the person who requested feedback

providerId.description: Employee ID of the feedback provider

providerJobDescription.description: Job details of the feedback provider

promotionId.description: Promotion process ID this feedback belongs to

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was requested

feedbackState.description: Current state of the feedback (e.g., Requested, Provided, Declined)

requestMessage.description: Message sent with the feedback request

relationship.description: Relationship of the provider to the employee (e.g., PEER, STAKEHOLDER)

reasonForExclusion.description: Reason the feedback was excluded, if applicable

reasonForDecline.description: Reason the feedback was declined, if applicable

declinedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was declined

response.description: Feedback response details, null if not yet provided

providedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when feedback was provided

lastFeedbackActionPerformed.description: Last action performed on this feedback

inlinePayload.name: getWorkContributions
inlinePayload.description: Looks up an employee's work history — projects, initiatives, and accomplishments they have worked on or contributed to. Use this when someone asks about what an employee has worked on, what projects they were involved in, or what their recent contributions are. Results can be filtered by date range (startDate, endDate in yyyy-MM-dd format).

callerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the manager the agent is acting on behalf of (used for authorization)

ownerEmployeeId.description: Employee ID (person ID) of the employee whose work contributions to retrieve

startDate.description: Optional start date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

endDate.description: Optional end date for filtering contributions (yyyy-MM-dd format). Only contributions overlapping this date range are returned.

workContributions.description: List of work contributions for the employee

owner.description: Person ID of the contribution owner

tags.description: Skill tags associated with the contribution

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Baseline safety, profanity, full PII anonymization, and grounding checks
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: guardrail-gamma

topicsConfig.name: Politics
topicsConfig.definition: Any content related to political parties, elections, voting advice, political advocacy, or public policy persuasion.
examples: Write a speech supporting candidate X
Explain why policy Y should be repealed

topicsConfig.name: Fiduciary
topicsConfig.definition: Content that provides personalized investment, tax, or legal advice, or implies a fiduciary relationship or responsibility.
examples: Tell me exactly which stocks to buy today
Create a personalized retirement plan for me
Is this specific tax shelter right for me?

Role in support of PXT Telemetry CloudWatch subscriptions: https://console.harmony.a2z.com/pxt-telemetry-docs/consumers/guides/cloudwatch-access

Fn::Join:
' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:impression:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| fields message.platform.payload.url as URL
| stats count(*) as ImpressionCount by URL
| sort by ImpressionCount desc
| limit 10
| display ImpressionCount, URL"}},{"type":"text","width":24,"height":4,"x":0,"y":14,"properties":{"markdown":"## Web Vitals

[Web vitals](https://web.dev/articles/vitals) are standardised performance metrics that measure the real-world user experience of a website. Monitoring these metrics and comparing these to Google's recommend thresholds helps you ensure your application delivers a fast, responsive, and stable experience.

- **[Time to First Byte (TTFB)](https://web.dev/articles/ttfb)**, **[First Contentful Paint (FCP)](https://web.dev/articles/fcp)** and **[Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)](https://web.dev/articles/lcp)** measure loading performance.
- **[Interaction to Next Paint (INP)](https://web.dev/articles/inp)** measures interactivity.
- **[Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)](https://web.dev/articles/cls)** measures visual stability."}},{"type":"metric","width":4,"height":6,"x":0,"y":18,"properties":{"view":"gauge","title":"TTFB (p75)","region":"

' | filter message.event.resourceName = "arn:pxt:telemetry:event:core:error:1.0.0"
| filter message.meta.payload.namespacePath like /.*\/?PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER/
| parse message.event.payload.stack "*\n" as ThrownBy
| fields message.event.payload.message as ErrorMessage, message.ingestionMeta.payload.eventTimestamp as EventTimestamp
| stats count(*) as ErrorCount by ErrorMessage, Browser, ThrownBy
| sort by ErrorCount desc
| limit 50
| display ErrorCount, Browser, ErrorMessage, ThrownBy"}}],"variables":[{"pattern":"PXT_TELEMETRY_NAMESPACE_PLACEHOLDER","type":"pattern","inputType":"select","id":"namespace","label":"Namespace","search":"PxtTelemetry MetricName=EventCount","populateFrom":"LeafNamespace"}]}

KMS key used to encrypt at rest artifacts used for deployments. This is the BARS key.

lifecyclePolicy.lifecyclePolicyText: {"rules":[{"rulePriority":1,"description":"Expire consumed image count more than 800","selection":{"tagStatus":"tagged","tagPrefixList":["BATS_CI_"],"countType":"imageCountMoreThan","countNumber":800},"action":{"type":"expire"}},{"rulePriority":2,"description":"Expire image count more than 1600","selection":{"tagStatus":"any","countType":"imageCountMoreThan","countNumber":1600},"action":{"type":"expire"}}]}
